chunks.text: End of Semester Information EECS Instructional Computer Accounts End of Semester - Summer 2016 Cardkeys expire Friday Aug 12 at 11:59pm EECS Summer Session class accounts and Dreamspark / e-Academy accounts expire Monday Aug 15 at 9am Frequently aske

counts expire Monday Aug 15 at 9am Frequently asked: Can I copy files from my account? (Copy to your computer using scp or a USB flash drive. See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/pub.cgi?file=ssh.help http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/pub

ssh.help http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/pub.cgi?file=multimedia.help ) When will the labs close? (open during weekday business hours, cardkeys expire Aug 12) What happens to my files in my expired class account? (archived and deleted after Aug

red class account? (archived and deleted after Aug 23) What happens to email sent to my expired account @imail? (bounces or is received by a new user next semester) How to I get a more permanent account? (See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.
nt? (See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html ) EECS Instructional Support (ISG) inst@eecs.berkeley.edu 378 & 386 Cory, 333 Soda August 2016
